description: Response length (word count) distribution for each paraphraser across all runs.
analysis: Response length is a key fingerprint feature. Llama-3.1-8B: mean=104 words (SD=47) Gemini-2.5-Flash: mean=93 words (SD=41) GPT-5-Nano: mean=86 words (SD=41) DIPPER: mean=75 words (SD=33). DIPPER (T5-based) typically produces shorter, more conservative paraphrases, while LLM-based models tend to generate longer, more elaborate rewrites. GPT-5-Nano often produces the longest outputs with added explanatory content.
